<?php namespace Aws; /** * Interface for adding and retrieving client-side monitoring events */ interface MonitoringEventsInterface { /** * Get client-side monitoring events attached to this object. Each event is * represented as an associative array within the returned array. * * @return array */ public function getMonitoringEvents(); /** * Prepend a client-side monitoring event to this object's event list * * @param array $event */ public function prependMonitoringEvent(array $event); /** * Append a client-side monitoring event to this object's event list * * @param array $event */ public function appendMonitoringEvent(array $event); }
